measurement_note: Size is R, with R sellers and R order rows. Every seller has one 2019 order and therefore qualifies. The app-local distinct-ID anti-join and an independent conditional-aggregation query process the order relation once in O(R log R) portable time. A correct correlated count query rescans all R orders for each seller, completes all 32/128/512 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.
